title: Vir Biotechnology Provides Corporate Update and Reports Third Quarter 2023 Financial Results
text: Vir Biotechnology Inc reported Q3 2023 financial results on November 2, 2023. The company's total revenues for the quarter ended September 30, 2023, were $2.6 million, a significant drop from $374.6 million for the same period in 2022. Net loss attributable to Vir for the third quarter of 2023 was $(163.4) million, or $(1.22) per share, basic and diluted, compared to a net income of $175.3 million, or $1.32 per share, basic and $1.30 per share, diluted, for the same period in 2022. As of September 30, 2023, the Company had approximately $1.7 billion in cash, cash equivalents and investments. Other income for the fourth quarter of 2023 was $18.3 million compared to other loss of $(1.1) million for the same period in 2022. R&D expenses in the fourth quarter of 2023 were $111.9 million compared to $155.2 million in the same period in 2022. In December of 2023, the Company announced strategic imperatives including closing R&D facilities in St. Louis, Missouri and Portland, Oregon in 2024, and eliminating approximately 12%, or 75 positions.
